title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 137.725 - Assessors, clerks, deputies, salaries and expenses to be paid from assessment fund
text:
137.725.  Assessors, clerks, deputies, salaries and expenses to be paid from assessment fund. — The salary of the assessor, the clerks, deputies, employees and all costs and expenses of the assessor shall be paid monthly or semimonthly by the county from the assessment fund established under section 137.750.
(L. 1980 S.B. 679 § 3, A.L. 1986 S.B. 476)
